_method: Hand-derived from the fixture inputs by 4-gate reasoning, not from engine output.

expected_findings._derivation: Public IP with null ipConfiguration — allocated but attached to nothing.

No AVNM admin rule; effective NSG allows 0.0.0.0/0:22 inbound (Gate2 open); default route 0.0.0.0/0 -> Internet (Gate3); NIC has public IP pip-vm-web-a (Gate4). All gates open and the NIC is not tagged sensitive -> reachable, High.

Same internet-facing NSG allow (0.0.0.0/0:22) but NO public IP and default route -> VirtualAppliance (Gate3/Gate4 closed). The over-permissive rule exists but is not reachable -> latent, Informational.

trap_assertions.must_not_have: reachable High — no public IP and the default route is a VirtualAppliance, so the internet path is closed despite the open NSG rule.
